summary: Where to watch - Monthly/yearly subscriber live game overlap market - Hero/Featured
description:
GIVEN the user is a monthly/yearly subscriber
AND there is a game scheduled/in-progress between teams in an overlapping viewing market 
AND the user is in the viewing market of the game
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user views the overlapping viewing market teams game in the hero/featured spot
steps.result:
THEN a blackout badge is displayed in the top left of the hero/featured spot
AND "Stream on: <away_broadcast_partner>, <home_broadcast_partner>" is displayed above "Broadcast Networks"
